enonce.texte:
📝 Exercise 1: Match the holidays with their dates.

HolidayDate
1. National DayA. 11th February
2. Independence DayB. 20th May
3. Youth DayC. 1st January

questions.texte: Match each holiday with its correct date.

enonce.texte: 📝 Exercise 2: Complete the sentences with the correct expression: like, don't like, love, hate.

questions.texte: I ___________ National Day because there are parades and celebrations.
questions.reponse: like / love

questions.texte: She ___________ the dry season because it is very hot.
questions.reponse: doesn't like / hates

questions.texte: We ___________ Youth Day because we can participate in sports competitions.
questions.reponse: like / love

questions.texte: They ___________ waiting in long queues during holidays.
questions.reponse: don't like / hate

questions.texte: My father ___________ cooking traditional dishes for Christmas.
questions.reponse: likes / loves

enonce.texte: 💬 Exercise 3: Answer the questions about your holiday preferences.

questions.texte: What is your favourite holiday in Cameroon? Why?
questions.reponse: My favourite holiday is National Day because I like the parades and cultural performances.

questions.texte: Do you like Youth Day? Why or why not?
questions.reponse: Yes, I like Youth Day because I can participate in sports competitions. / No, I don't like Youth Day because it is very hot.

questions.texte: What do you prefer, National Day or Independence Day? Why?
questions.reponse: I prefer National Day because it is a big celebration with parades and music.

questions.texte: What do you like about Christmas?
questions.reponse: I like Christmas because I get presents and spend time with my family.

enonce.texte:
📖 Exercise 4: Read the text and answer the questions.

My name is Marie. I am 11 years old. I love National Day in Cameroon. It is on 20th May. On this day, I wear my traditional dress and go to the stadium with my family. We watch military parades and listen to the president's speech. I like the music and dancing after the parade. I prefer National Day to Independence Day because there are more activities. I don't like staying at home on holidays. I like to go out and celebrate with other people.

questions.texte: What is Marie's favourite holiday?
questions.reponse: Marie's favourite holiday is National Day.

questions.texte: When is National Day in Cameroon?
questions.reponse: It is on 20th May.

questions.texte: What does Marie do on National Day?
questions.reponse: She wears her traditional dress and goes to the stadium with her family.

questions.texte: Why does Marie prefer National Day to Independence Day?
questions.reponse: Because there are more activities on National Day.

questions.texte: What doesn't Marie like?
questions.reponse: She doesn't like staying at home on holidays.

enonce.texte:
✍️ Exercise 5: Write 4-5 sentences describing a holiday you like.

Instructions:

  • Say the name of the holiday.
  • Say the date.
  • Describe what you do.
  • Explain why you like it.

questions.texte: Write 4-5 sentences about a holiday you like.
questions.reponse:
Exemple de réponse :

I like Independence Day in Cameroon. It is on 1st January. On this day, I wear my traditional clothes and go to the parade. I like the music and dancing. I like Independence Day because it reminds us of our freedom.

enonce.texte:
✉️ Exercise 6: Write a short postcard to a friend about a holiday.

Instructions:

  • Greet your friend.
  • Say which holiday you are celebrating.
  • Describe what you are doing.
  • Say what you like about it.

questions.texte: Write a short postcard (4-5 sentences) to a friend about a holiday.
questions.reponse:
Exemple de réponse :

Dear Paul,

I hope you are well. I am celebrating National Day today! I am at the stadium with my family. We are watching the military parade. I like the music and the dancers. I wish you were here!

Your friend, Marie

enonce.texte: 💬 Exercise 7: Complete the dialogues with the correct expressions.

questions.texte:
Paul: Do you like National Day?
Marie: Yes, I ___________ it because there are parades.
questions.reponse: like / love

questions.texte:
Paul: Which holiday do you prefer, National Day or Youth Day?
Marie: I ___________ Youth Day because there are sports competitions.
questions.reponse: prefer

questions.texte:
Paul: Do you like the dry season?
Marie: No, I ___________ it because it is too hot.
questions.reponse: don't like / hate

questions.texte:
Paul: What do you like about Christmas?
Marie: I ___________ the food and the presents.
questions.reponse: like / love

enonce.texte:
✍️ Exercise 8: Write a short paragraph about your holiday preferences.

Instructions:

  • Say which holiday you like.
  • Say which holiday you don't like.
  • Give reasons for your preferences.
  • Write 5-6 sentences.

questions.texte: Write 5-6 sentences about your holiday preferences.
questions.reponse:
Exemple de réponse :

My favourite holiday is Youth Day. It is on 11th February. I like this holiday because I can participate in sports competitions with my friends. I don't like the dry season because it is too hot. I prefer holidays when the weather is cool. I like to celebrate with my family and friends.
